summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Metro Travel rebranding and core functionality. Backend APIs 100% functional (22/22 tests passed). Frontend branding verified across all pages with Turkish language support working correctly.

issues: Admin Panel shows 'Admin Panel' text with Shield icon instead of 'Metro Travel' with M logo - this is a design choice to differentiate admin from main site, but could be updated for brand consistency

Backend: Get current user info with auth token

Backend: Hotel search by city filter

Backend: Get hotel by ID (GET /api/hotels/{hotel_id})
Backend: Hotel not found returns 404

context_for_next_testing_agent: Metro Travel rebranding verified. All HotelConnect references changed to Metro Travel. Color scheme uses metro-navy (#0a192f) and metro-orange (#f97316). Turkish language support working. Search API returns results in 'results' key. Payment system is MOCKED.

mocked_apis.payment: Payment processing is mocked - bookings auto-confirm with PAID status
